tool_purpose: Controlnet v1.1 is a neural network structure to control diffusion models by adding extra conditions. This checkpoint corresponds to the ControlNet conditioned on Scribble images. It can be used in combination with Stable Diffusion, such as runwayml/stable-diffusion-v1-5. Framework: Diffusers. Functionality: Text-to-Image. API call: ControlNetModel.from_pretrained('lllyasviel/control_v11p_sd15_scribble').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
